case_title: BRANDON LEE FAILING VS. PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FAILING, BRANDON LEE AS TO DEFENDANT PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAILING, BRANDON LEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, LP. ARTICLE 29 SECTION 2917 OF THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE CODE DOES NOT PROVIDE A PRIVATE REMEDY FOR VIOLATIONS OF THIS NOISE ORDINANCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-03-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED NOV-29-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BRANDON LEE FAILING. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY AND PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY LP'S REPRESENTATIVE CONRADO VELLVE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
